falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (10% above current level) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this threshold would indicate a confirmed bull market phase, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and blowoff pattern assumptions.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average of the NASDAQ drops below 12,000 with a 5% closing gap below the 50-day moving average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This technical breakdown would confirm a bear market trend, directly refuting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict and blowoff pattern's implied volatility regime.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 100-basis-point rate cut in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such aggressive monetary stimulus would invalidate the blowoff pattern by injecting liquidity and reversing the expected bearish trajectory.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
